title: Hypnos Coins
description: This mod adds custom coins inspired by the most iconic materials in the game, each with its own unique value and style.
body:
## Do you want a currency system that fits perfectly into the Minecraft universe? With Hypnos Coins it is now possible!

This mod adds custom coins inspired by the most iconic materials in the game, each with its own unique value and style:

### **Coins included in the mod:**

🟠 **Copper Coin**: The most basic, but useful in simple trades.

⚪ **Iron Coin**: A solid step towards prosperity.

🟡 **Gold Coin**: Shines and shines, perfect for big purchases!

🟢 **Emerald Coin**: Ideal for trading with skilled villagers.

🔵 **Diamond Coin**: For high-value transactions.

⚫ **Netherite Coin**: The ultimate currency, for the most powerful players!


### **Features**:

Currency system based on in-game materials.

Custom crafting.

Balanced: Each coin has its corresponding value in the Minecraft hierarchy.

Perfect for custom servers or worlds where you want to implement an economy.

**Get rich and establish a new economic order in your Minecraft world with Hypnos Coins! 💰**
